message:
test(perf): Expand benchmark coverage and add property-based performance tests

Enhance performance test infrastructure to catch regressions earlier and
provide better visibility into optimization opportunities.

Cache microbenchmarks (benches/cache_micro.rs):
- Reorganize benchmark groups for clearer reporting
- Add cache eviction rate benchmarks
- Add concurrent access benchmarks
- Improve measurement precision with black_box

Runtime performance (benches/runtime_perf.rs):
- Add canonicalize_long_message benchmark (target: <500µs)
- Add vector_index_search_50k benchmark (target: <10ms)
- Add index_small_batch benchmark (target: <20ms)
- Add search_latency benchmark (target: <50µs)
- Add comparison baselines for CI regression detection
- Improve warmup and iteration counts for stability

End-to-end performance (tests/perf_e2e.rs):
- Add full pipeline benchmarks (index -> search -> display)
- Add memory high-water-mark tracking
- Add timing assertions for critical paths
- Add throughput measurements for batch operations

Property-based tests (tests/perf_proptest.rs):
- Add proptest strategies for realistic workloads
- Test performance invariants across input variations
- Verify O(n) vs O(n²) behavior boundaries
- Fuzz test hot paths for edge cases

CI integration:
- Benchmarks run on PR and compare against main baseline
- 10% regression threshold triggers CI failure
- Results archived for historical tracking
- critcmp used for statistical comparison

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
